code:
type Tree =
  | Leaf
  | Node(left: Tree, right: Tree)

fn depth(_ tree: Tree) -> Int
  match tree
  when Leaf
    0
  when Node(left: l, right: r)
    let dl = depth(l)
    let dr = depth(r)
    if dl >= dr
      1 + dl
    else
      1 + dr
    end
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let t = Tree.Node(
    left: Tree.Node(left: Tree.Leaf, right: Tree.Node(left: Tree.Leaf, right: Tree.Leaf)),
    right: Tree.Leaf
  )
  let d = depth(t)
  println("depth=#{d}")
end
